raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 602 requires consent to be obtained prior to depicting a person in digitally produced sexually explicit material (i.e., a deepfake).",
    "Deepfake technology is disproportionately used to harass and humiliate women by scraping their photos from the internet and manipulating them into nonconsensual porn.",
    "Assembly Bill 730 prohibits the dissemination of materially deceptive audio or visual media (i.e., a deepfake) of a candidate with actual malice within 60 days of an election.",
    "Deepfakes have the potential to incite violence, alter election outcomes, and undermine diplomacy.",
    "Deepfakes are a powerful and dangerous new technology with the potential to sow misinformation and discord among an already hyper-partisan electorate.",
    "Driver Assisted Truck Platooning (DATP) technologies allow trucks to safely follow each other with less than 100 feet of following distance by syncing acceleration and braking.",
    "DATP technologies can enhance safety, improve traffic flow stability, reduce congestion, and lower fuel consumption considerably."
  ]
}
```
